headline: Diamondback Energy: The Iran Oil Rally Changes Things (Rating Downgrade)
summary: Diamondback Energy (FANG) downgraded to Buy after a 40% rally; Q1 beat, higher guidance, faster debt cuts, bigger dividends/buybacks.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Diamondback Energy, Raises Price Target to $240
summary: Mizuho  analyst Nitin Kumar   maintains Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $220 to $240.
